title: Footsteps at Midnight
content: Around midnight, Sarah woke up after hearing footsteps outside her bedroom. The house was silent except for the slow sounds moving along the hallway. She listened carefully, wondering who could be awake so late. Gathering her courage, she opened the door and looked around. No one was there. She checked every room and found everything exactly as she had left it. The next morning, her father smiled when he saw muddy footprints near the back door. A neighborhood dog had entered through the open door during the night before quietly leaving again.
